title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and full-stack web development fundamentals from scratch with practical projects.

title: UI/UX Design Fundamentals
description: Master the basics of user interface and user experience design, including wireframes, layouts, color theory, and usability principles.

title: Digital Marketing Masterclass
description: Build practical digital marketing skills with SEO, social media strategy, content planning, analytics, and campaign optimization.

title: React & Next.js Advanced Guide
description: Deepen your frontend skills with advanced React patterns, Next.js App Router, routing, optimization, reusable components, and deployment workflow.

title: Brand Identity & Logo Design
description: Learn how to create strong visual identities, professional logos, brand colors, typography systems, and presentation-ready design assets.

title: Social Media Growth Strategy
description: Create growth-focused social media strategies using audience research, content calendars, engagement tactics, and performance tracking.
